client: Prof. Anne Frenzel — University of Munich
title: Scientific Illustration for Academic Paper
description: Created visualizations for a peer-reviewed publication on measuring teacher enthusiasm, collaborating directly with Professor Anne Frenzel. Work published on Figshare and cited in academic research.

title: Instruction Manual Illustrations
description: Translated 3D product models into precise technical line art for instruction and installation manuals across multiple products including People Counting and Silo Counting devices.

title: USPTO Patent Illustration — Smart Diaper
description: Produced formal patent drawings for a USPTO filing for a smart diaper invention, meeting strict USPTO illustration standards for patent submission.

title: 18 Origami Instruction Illustrations
description: Designed and illustrated 18 origami folding sequences with step-by-step instruction guides, crafted for young audiences in a clear and engaging visual style.

title: HVAC Technician Reference Manual
description: Designed a print-ready industrial field manual from Figma mockups — refining, vectorizing and unifying layouts into a cohesive, durable technician reference booklet.
